languages.text: "В смерти нет ничего страшного, если ты прожил достойную жизнь".
"There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."
languages.original_text: "В смерти нет ничего страшного, если ты прожил достойную жизнь".

traits.locale_text: "There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."
"There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."
"There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."

languages.text: «No hay por qué temer a la muerte si vive una vida digna».
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."

traits.locale_text: «No hay por qué temer a la muerte si vive una vida digna».

languages.text: “如果你这一生活得有价值，死亡也没什么好怕的。”
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."

traits.locale_text: “如果你这一生活得有价值，死亡也没什么好怕的。”

languages.text: « La mort n'est pas à craindre si vous vivez avec honneur. »
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."

traits.locale_text: « La mort n'est pas à craindre si vous vivez avec honneur. »

languages.text: "Es gibt keinen Grund, den Tod zu fürchten, wenn Ihr würdig gelebt habt."
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."

traits.locale_text: "Es gibt keinen Grund, den Tod zu fürchten, wenn Ihr würdig gelebt habt."

languages.text: "価値ある人生を送ったなら、死を恐れることはない"
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."

languages.text: "Saygın bir hayat sürmüşsen ölümde korkulacak bir şey yoktur."
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear in death if you have lived a worthy life."

traits.locale_text: "Saygın bir hayat sürmüşsen ölümde korkulacak bir şey yoktur."
